ddls:
CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Trustly, Swish, Nordea, Zimpler) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the payment method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment method is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the payment method details were updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency supported by the payment method */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country or region where the payment method is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method the fee belongs to */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., flat rate, percentage) */,
  "fee_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the fee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the fee applies */,
  "is_percentage" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fee is a percentage of the transaction amount */,
  "minimum_fee" TEXT /* Minimum fee amount */,
  "maximum_fee" TEXT /* Maximum fee amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deposit_limits" (
  "deposit_limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deposit limit */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method the deposit limit belongs to */,
  "min_amount" TEXT /* Minimum deposit amount */,
  "max_amount" TEXT /* Maximum deposit amount */,
  "daily_limit" TEXT /* Daily deposit limit */,
  "weekly_limit" TEXT /* Weekly deposit limit */,
  "monthly_limit" TEXT /* Monthly deposit limit */,
  "is_cumulative" INTEGER /* Indicates if the limits are cumulative within the specified period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deposit_limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deposit_limits_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deposit_times" (
  "deposit_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deposit time */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method the deposit time belongs to */,
  "deposit_time" TEXT /* Deposit time (e.g., instant) */,
  "is_instant" INTEGER /* Indicates if the deposit is instant */,
  "processing_time" TEXT /* Average processing time for deposits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deposit_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deposit_times_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "withdrawal_limits" (
  "withdrawal_limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each withdrawal limit */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method the withdrawal limit belongs to */,
  "min_amount" TEXT /* Minimum withdrawal amount */,
  "max_amount" TEXT /* Maximum withdrawal amount */,
  "daily_limit" TEXT /* Daily withdrawal limit */,
  "weekly_limit" TEXT /* Weekly withdrawal limit */,
  "monthly_limit" TEXT /* Monthly withdrawal limit */,
  "is_cumulative" INTEGER /* Indicates if the limits are cumulative within the specified period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("withdrawal_limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_withdrawal_limits_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pending_withdrawal_times" (
  "pending_withdrawal_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pending withdrawal time */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method the pending withdrawal time belongs to */,
  "pending_withdrawal_time" TEXT /* Pending withdrawal time (e.g., between 24-48 hours) */,
  "processing_time" TEXT /* Average processing time for pending withdrawals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pending_withdrawal_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pending_withdrawal_times_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "withdrawal_times" (
  "withdrawal_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each withdrawal time */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method the withdrawal time belongs to */,
  "withdrawal_time" TEXT /* Withdrawal time (e.g., up to 2 business days) */,
  "processing_time" TEXT /* Average processing time for withdrawals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("withdrawal_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_withdrawal_times_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the customer logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
